query: SELECT id, hostName, cuisineStyle, menuDescription, bio, pricePerPerson, maxGuests, profilePhotoUrl, foodPhotoUrls, district, title, languages, activities, overseasExperience, funFacts, whyHost, culturalPassions, otherPassions, mealDurationMinutes FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Chuan%' OR hostName LIKE '%Ayi%' OR hostName LIKE '%Grace%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, hostName, cuisineStyle, menuDescription, bio, pricePerPerson, maxGuests, profilePhotoUrl, foodPhotoUrls, district, title, languages, activities, overseasExperience, funFacts, whyHost, culturalPassions, otherPassions, mealDurationMinutes FROM host_listings WHERE hostName LIKE '%Chuan%' OR hostName LIKE '%Ayi%' OR hostName LIKE '%Grace%';
messages: 90002	Grace Tong	Chinese and Western Fusion	My specialty is creating a warm, authentic "Shanghai home" dining experience, blending nutritious local flavors with comforting international dishes.
I prepare fresh meals using market ingredients, featuring classics like:
1. Braised Beef Brisket with Daikon Radish (萝卜炖牛腩)
2. Spinach in Supreme Broth with Century Egg (上汤菠菜)
3. Signature Seafood Noodle Soup (海鲜汤面)
4. Foil-Baked Whole Fish with Lemongrass (香茅烤鱼)
5. Creamy Coconut Chicken Curry (椰香咖喱鸡)
6. Oven-Roasted Chicken Feast (烤鸡大餐)
The menu can be updated on the day depending on what’s fresh. Or let me know what you want to try :)
Hi, I’m Grace. Born in Guizhou and shaped by more than a decade living abroad—mostly in the U.S.—I found my way back to Chinese cooking through a familiar homesickness: missing the flavors of home.

Cooking authentic Chinese dishes became my love language, and after two years back in China, I’m excited to open my kitchen to fellow travelers from around the world. Come share a thoughtfully prepared meal, good conversation, and a genuine cultural exchange—one table, many stories.	300	4	https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882183/host-images/vaioaycyfqjqqtxng3gl.jpg	["https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882118/host-images/lletohvybcivoacisryq.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882120/host-images/stacv7tg6rlwa6ltigqk.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882122/host-images/enerun7rg2wvkrnq29ef.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882124/host-images/gmwcadmks0fulwavwo6r.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882126/host-images/zxols0urs8x0gd1szuzm.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882128/host-images/rrjgtrzmwnq9sd6gk1pj.jpg"]	Xuhui	Authentic "Shanghai home" dining experience featuring Braised Beef Brisket with Daikon Radish	["Fluent English", "Mandarin"]	["market-visit", "park-visit", "cultural-tour"]	I lived in the U.S. for over a decade, which deepened my appreciation for authentic Chinese cooking and gave me a unique perspective on cultural exchange through food.	Born in Guizhou, I rediscovered my love for Chinese cooking while living abroad. After two years back in China, I'm excited to share the flavors that brought me home.	Cooking became my love language when I was homesick abroad. Now I want to open my kitchen to travelers and share thoughtfully prepared meals, good conversation, and genuine cultural exchange.	I'm passionate about authentic Chinese regional cuisines, especially the dishes that connect us to our roots and tell our personal stories.	I love bringing people together over food and conversation. Sharing meals is how I connect with others and build meaningful relationships across cultures.	120

120001	Grace Tong	Dumpling class and tasting	Dumplings are a staple food for Chinese people. We don't just eat them during festivals like Chinese New Year and the Winter Solstice—we make them from scratch. Join us for this magical process as we transform flour and various ingredients into delicious dumplings.
It will be a home dining experience, meaning you will be invited to my home! It’s not commercial - it’s where I live, work, play and cook :)
Of course we will also be sharing our cultures as we meet. Look forward to the cultural exchanges!
P.S. We have different fillings for dumplings available:
1) Chives, egg, pork, shrimp (韭菜、鸡蛋、猪肉、虾仁)
2) Zucchini, egg, shrimp (西葫芦、鸡蛋、虾仁)
3) Zucchini, carrot, egg, shrimp (西葫芦、胡萝卜、鸡蛋、虾仁)
4) Fennel, pork (茴香、猪肉)
5) Fennel, dried tofu, egg (茴香、豆干、鸡蛋)

We can discuss and custom which fillings work for you!	Hi, I’m Grace. Born in Guizhou and shaped by more than a decade living abroad—mostly in the U.S.—I found my way back to Chinese cooking through a familiar homesickness: missing the flavors of home. Cooking authentic Chinese dishes became my love language, and after two years back in China, I’m excited to open my kitchen to fellow travelers from around the world. Come share a thoughtfully prepared meal, good conversation, and a genuine cultural exchange—one table, many stories.	250	4	https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882183/host-images/vaioaycyfqjqqtxng3gl.jpg	["https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769881401/host-images/vpwz3itks0vllkudk7s5.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769881405/host-images/rdqdicxlvgx5v0vctaia.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769881409/host-images/jzhgvwqjv14rvy17mztr.jpg"]	Xuhui	Home Dining in Shanghai - Learn to Make Traditional Chinese Dumplings	["Mandarin", "English"]	["cooking-class"]	Lived in the U.S. for over a decade before returning to China	I specialize in teaching the art of dumpling making, a skill passed down through generations in Chinese families. We offer 5 different filling options to customize your experience!	I love teaching visitors the hands-on skills of traditional Chinese cooking, especially the meditative art of folding dumplings. It's a chance to share culture through an interactive, memorable experience	Preserving traditional Chinese cooking techniques and passing them on to the next generation through hands-on teaching	Culinary education, cultural exchange through cooking, and helping people connect with Chinese traditions in a fun, interactive way	120

150001	Jiading Ayi 	Local Shanghaiese style	Step into Auntie’s cozy home (together with her daughter!) where the kitchen fills with the aroma of slow-braised Hong Shao Rou (red-braised pork belly) and simmering Egg Dumpling Soup—true Benbang comfort food.
The menu follows nature's calendar:
Spring: Fresh bamboo shoots dug from the backyard garden
Summer: Giant juicy grapes from Malu Town (famous local specialty)
Autumn: Osmanthus lattes made with flowers shaken from tree in the yard
Winter: Frost-kissed vegetables from the earth, transformed into hands-on Vegetable & Pork Wonton (Wrapping lessons also available)

You'll dine family-style at auntie's sunny garden or indoor wooden roundtable (2-6 guests max), enjoying dishes you won't find in restaurants—just honest, seasonal home cooking.	Auntie Lee — a true daughter of Jiading Old Town, the very cradle of Shanghai's famous soup dumplings (Xiao Long Bao). Since 2016, she has been a Superhost on Airbnb, welcoming hundreds of guests into her courtyard home. Though her English is limited, her hospitality is universal: she has traveled widely herself and communicates flawlessly through the language of delicious food.

She’ll be joined by her daughter (management at foreign-owned company) or her daughter’s childhood friend (multinational corporate background), ensuring smooth conversation and cultural bridge-building over the meal or other activities.	368	6	https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882814/host-images/m953al1omf5zczdkum7h.jpg	["https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882814/host-images/m953al1omf5zczdkum7h.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882816/host-images/tprru9pocfkfdchwatw0.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882819/host-images/eippvkl9rbajx3gpjwyx.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882821/host-images/ujfy1gmzw3pdrhcjoq8v.jpg", "https://res.cloudinary.com/drxfcfayd/image/upload/v1769882824/host-images/aavo9glnluvnx5fawn0p.jpg"]	Jiading	NULL	["Mandarin", "Basic English"]	["cooking-class", "market-visit", "cultural-tour"]	I'm deeply rooted in Jiading and Shanghai - this is my home and my passion. My expertise comes from a lifetime of living and cooking in Shanghai, not from traveling abroad. I believe the best hospitality comes from truly knowing your own culture.	I'm known as a true daughter of Jiading Old Town - the birthplace of Shanghai's famous Xiao Long Bao! Since 2016, I've been a Superhost on Airbnb, welcoming hundreds of guests from around the world into my courtyard home.	Though my English is limited, I believe hospitality is universal. I communicate through the language of delicious food, and I love sharing the warmth of authentic Shanghai home cooking with visitors. Every meal is a chance to connect across cultures.	I'm passionate about preserving traditional Jiading culinary heritage, especially our famous soup dumplings. I love sharing stories about old Shanghai neighborhoods and introducing guests to the authentic flavors that have been passed down through generations in my family.	I love sharing stories about old Shanghai neighborhoods and local history. I enjoy showing guests around Jiading Old Town and introducing them to the authentic local lifestyle beyond just the dining experience.	120
180001	Chuan 川	Guangxi-Guangdong-Southeast Asian Fusion	Signature Dishes:
- Guangxi Sour-Spicy Tomato Noodles with Thai Basil（廣西老友風味 x 泰式香葉番茄粉）
- Slow-Braised Radish Beef Brisket in Clear Broth（古法慢燉蘿蔔清湯牛腩）
- Sizzling Chicken with Cantonese Clay Pot Magic（廣式砂煲啫啫雞）
- Chuan's Signature Eggplants in Homemade Paste（川特制秘醬茄子 🍆）

Menu adjusts seasonally with fresh ingredients. Focus on nutritious home-style cooking with balanced flavors.	Chuan's culinary journey began in childhood when she couldn't find delicious, lightly-oiled stir-fried eggplant in restaurants, so she decided to cook herself. Her passion for home cooking was ignited from that moment. Her philosophy of "eating well" means nutritious, balanced meals with clean flavors and authentic taste. Her dishes blend ingredients and flavors from Guangxi, Guangdong, and Southeast Asia.	230	2	https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/yqAeFzoepWJBZJHc.jpg	["https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/vkfJYmdVVbfnfhhQ.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/QZcEqDKnxwbOrnzM.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/QcfUYovqTanhGHgC.JPG"]	Xuhui	Guangxi-Guangdong-Southeast Asian Fusion Home Dining	["Mandarin", "English"]	[]	I didn’t live abroad before but I have been traveling to Southeast Asia!	I blend Guangxi, Guangdong, and Southeast Asian flavors in my cooking, creating fusion dishes that tell the story of my culinary journey	I enjoy interactions on dinner table. It’s one way we get close to our friends and loved ones. I’ve been doing that for local friends and it’s time to try it with our international friends!	Preserving and sharing the diverse regional cuisines of China, especially the underrepresented flavors of Guangxi and Guangdong	Cultural exchange through food, connecting people from different backgrounds over shared meals	120
